MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Leila K. Mongan, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3915, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Joseph Northington, Tel. 415.375.3728, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf.

The matter was discussed. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Plaintiff to file his First Amended Complaint no later than March 8. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR #12353
